name: Double Chocolate Cherry Bourbon Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate in the top of a double boiler, removing from heat.
2. Add corn syrup and bourbon to the melted chocolate.
3. In a large bowl, mix crushed wafers, nuts, confectioners sugar, and cherries.
4. Add the chocolate mixture to the bowl with the wafer ingredients.
5. Stir until everything is well blended.
6. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
7. Roll the mixture into 1-inch balls.
8. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
